name: Wistia
description: Wistia — Business video hosting platform with player customization, heatmaps, and CTA overlays.

seo.title: Wistia — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Wistia: Wistia — Business video hosting platform with player customization, heatmaps, and CTA overlays.

when_to_use: Business video hosting with heatmaps and viewer engagement data
Gated video with email capture for marketing lead generation
Custom CTA overlays on videos embedded in marketing sites
Video series and channel pages for thought leadership content
HubSpot and Marketo integrations for video marketing automation

pros: Polished player tailored for B2B marketing
Heatmaps, CTAs, and lead capture built in
cons: Not meant for consumer UGC at scale
Live streaming features lag behind rivals
review.verdict: Best-in-class for B2B marketing video, wrong tool for high-volume UGC or broadcast-grade live streaming.
review.best_for: B2B marketing teams tracking video engagement and capturing leads
review.not_for: Consumer platforms with UGC volume or streamers needing advanced live features
